data.title: Analyst Unveils Massive Downside Targets for Top Ethereum Rival Solana, Updates Outlook on Bitcoin and Ethena
data.description:
An analyst who accurately called the 2022 crypto collapse believes that one Ethereum (ETH) rival is on the verge of a deep correction. Pseudonymous analyst Capo tells his 129,129 subscribers on his Telegram channel that Solana (SOL) is facing resistance at the $200 level and may decline more than 68% from its current value.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/24/analyst-unveils-massive-downside-targets-for-top-ethereum-rival-solana-updates-outlook-on-bitcoin-and-ethena/

data.title: Trump plans rare visit to headquarters ignored by U.S. presidents for 20 years
data.description:
President Donald Trump will be the first president in nearly two decades to visit the Fed headquarters.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/trump-plans-rare-visit-to-headquarters-ignored-by-presidents-for-20-years

data.title: Strategy expands preferred stock offering to $2B amid Bitcoin-fueled rally — Report
data.description:
Michael Saylor’s company has accumulated 607,770 BTC since adopting its Bitcoin treasury strategy in 2020.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/strategy-raises-2b-preferred-stock-bitcoin-rally?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Strategy upsizes preferred ‘Stretch’ stock offering to $2 billion to buy more bitcoin
data.description:
Strategy expanded its Stretch preferred sale to $2 billion and will price shares at $90, raising fresh capital to grow its 607,770 bitcoin treasury.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/364199/strategy-upsizes-stretch-stock-bitcoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: BitMine Immersion aims to stake 5% of Ethereum’s supply as holdings exceed $2 billion
data.description:
BitMine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) has strengthened its position as Ethereum’s largest publicly traded holder, with its total ETH portfolio now valued at over $2 billion. In a disclosure on July 24, the company announced that it currently holds 566,776 ETH, acquired at an average price of $3,643 per token.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitmine-immersion-aims-to-stake-5-of-ethereums-supply-as-holdings-exceed-2-billion/

The crypto-native bank will bring Ethena Labs’ USDtb — a yield-bearing synthetic dollar — onshore for U. S. issuance and redemption, […] The post Anchorage Digital Rolls Out First Fully Compliant U. S.
source: https://coindoo.com/anchorage-digital-rolls-out-first-fully-compliant-u-s-stablecoin/

data.title: Ripple co-founder moves $140M in XRP to exchanges amid historic rally
data.description:
Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen has moved $140M in XRP to exchanges just as the token surged to new highs, sparking fresh scrutiny amid a broader crypto rally.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/ripple-co-founder-moves-140m-in-xrp-to-exchanges-amid-historic-rally

GameSquare (NASDAQ:GAME) has acquired CryptoPunk #5577 — one of the rarest and most culturally important NFTs — from Compound founder and Superst

data.title: Ethereum network hits all-time high in gas usage
data.description:
The Ethereum network shows unprecedented demand, recently marking a new record of daily gas used. The metric shows peak on-chain activity, while individual transactions remain relatively cheap. Activity picked up in the past few days, with daily gas use rising to a record level. The metric reveals Ethereum is key to on-chain activity, and that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-network-all-time-high-gas-usage/

data.title: Trading platform WOO X pauses withdrawals after $14M breach
data.description:
The hack only affected a limited number of user wallets, but withdrawals have been temporarily paused for additional safety, the team said.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/woo-x-pauses-withdrawals-14-million-breach?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto exchange WOO X suspends withdrawals, users hacked for $14M
data.description:
Taiwan-based crypto exchange WOO X said it will cover the $14M worth of crypto stolen as part of the hack.
source: https://protos.com/crypto-exchange-woo-x-suspends-withdrawals-users-hacked-for-14m/

data.title: Centralized exchange WOO X investigates ‘contained incident’ resulting in estimated $14 million loss
data.description:
The centralized exchange said it is tracking the funds alongside external security firms and will make customers whole.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/364188/centralized-exchange-woo-x-investigates-contained-incident-resulting-in-estimated-14-million-loss?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.description:
"Could XRP reach $5 by the year 2025? In this article, we will delve into some of the bullish catalysts and potential driving forces behind this cryptocurrency that you may not be aware of, highlighting the market trends, technological advancements, and strategic partnerships that could significantly influence its price movement in the coming years."

data.title: Satoshi-Era Bitcoin Whale Moves $469 Million in BTC After 14 Years
data.description:
A Bitcoin whale holding nearly half a billion dollars in BTC moved the fortune to a new address Thursday after more than 14 years.
source: https://decrypt.co/331613/satoshi-era-bitcoin-whale-moves-469-million-btc-after-14-years

data.title: Ethereum stakers face 9-day wait as stETH loops fall into the red
data.description:
An Aave interest rate shock prompted over 475,000 validators to exit and pushed stETH into a prolonged depeg
source: https://blockworks.co/news/ethereum-stakers-9-day-wait-steth

data.title: XRP Slumps After Heavy Sell-Off—But Whales Keep Scooping It Up at THIS Price Level
data.description:
XRP, the digital asset associated with the Ripple network, has experienced a significant decline in its market value following a substantial sell-off by investors. However, despite this downward trend, large holders known as "whales" continue to actively purchase XRP at this particular price level, indicating their belief in the cryptocurrency's potential for recovery and growth in the near future.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-slumps-after-heavy-sell-offbut-whales-keep-scooping-it-up-at-this-price-level/

data.title: Largest Solana treasury company falls below 1X mNAV
data.description:
As of publication time, Upexi has a market capitalization of $330M and holds 1. 9M SOL worth over $353M. Its mNAV is a sad 0. 94X.
source: https://protos.com/largest-solana-treasury-company-falls-below-1x-mnav/

data.title: Tether Prepares for Future USDT Issuance on Ethereum Network
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Whale Alert has detected the minting of 1 billion USDT on the Ethereum network by Tether. Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino clarified that this transaction is authorized but not yet issued, indicating it will serve as inventory for upcoming issuance requests and on-chain exchanges.
